title: Consumer and industrial marketing
summary: 9609 AS — B2C vs B2B marketing differences and strategies.
learningObjectives: Compare buying behaviour in B2C and B2B.
Explain implications for the marketing mix.

simpleExplanation.title: Selling to people vs selling to businesses
simpleExplanation.summary: Consumer marketing targets individuals; industrial marketing targets organisations with different decision processes.
steps: Fewer B2B buyers, larger order values.

sections.content: **Consumer vs industrial marketing** (3.1.4) prepares **3.3 marketing mix**. Contrast **promotion and place** for each type.
